channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Ebola, Hantavirus Show World's Risk Preparedness Lagging: Pandemic Expert

media:content.media:description: Helen Clark, the co-chair of the Independent Panel for Pandemic Preparedness and Response

item.description: The deadly hantavirus and Ebola outbreaks show that while the response to declared public health crises has improved, awareness of pandemic risks still lags, a...
item.content:encoded: The deadly hantavirus and Ebola outbreaks show that while the response to declared public health crises has improved, awareness of pandemic risks still lags, a...

item.title: Who Is Mahmoud Ahmadinejad, Trump's 1st Choice For Iran's New Leader

media:content.media:description: How Ahmadinejad was recruited to take part in the plan remains unknown.

item.description: Many who remembered Ahmadinejad's term in office from 2005 to 2013 recall him as a Holocaust denier, an atom-bomb fanatic, and someone who shoved Islamic revolutionary ideology down the throats of a country already weary of it.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1101700/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Many who remembered Ahmadinejad's term in office from 2005 to 2013 recall him as a Holocaust denier, an atom-bomb fanatic, and someone who shoved Islamic revolutionary ideology down the throats of a country already weary of it.

item.title: Google's AI Boss Hints Bots May Surpass Human Intelligence Soon
item.description: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis says Superhuman AI is close
item.content:encoded: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis says Superhuman AI is close

item.title: WHO Chief Concerned Over 'Scale And Speed' Of Ebola Outbreak As Congo Reports 134 Dead
item.description: Ebola is a highly contagious virus and can be contracted via bodily fluids such as vomit, blood or semen. The disease it causes is rare but severe and often fatal.
item.content:encoded: Ebola is a highly contagious virus and can be contracted via bodily fluids such as vomit, blood or semen. The disease it causes is rare but severe and often fatal.

item.title: Ebola Alert: US Missionary Being Transferred To Germany, CDC Confirms

media:content.media:description: U.S. citizen who contracted Ebola in Congo is on his way to Germany for treatment

item.description: A U.S. citizen who contracted Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo, where an outbreak of a rare strain of the virus
item.content:encoded: A U.S. citizen who contracted Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo, where an outbreak of a rare strain of the virus

item.title: Hantavirus Update: MV Hondius Cruise Operator Says Ship Not The Source Of Outbreak
item.description: The operator of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak said the virus was likely introduced before passengers boarded and did not...
item.content:encoded: The operator of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak said the virus was likely introduced before passengers boarded and did not...

item.title: Argentina Authorities Trap Rats In Ushuaia, Hunt For Hantavirus Outbreak Source
item.description: The scientists, wearing bright blue gloves and surgical masks, checked the 150 box traps they had set out the previous night, dropping dead rats into black plastic bags that they hoisted into pickup trucks bound for a makeshift lab where they said th
item.content:encoded: The scientists, wearing bright blue gloves and surgical masks, checked the 150 box traps they had set out the previous night, dropping dead rats into black plastic bags that they hoisted into pickup trucks bound for a makeshift lab where they said th

item.title: WHO Raises Alarm Over Speed Of Ebola Outbreak As Congo Announces 134 Deaths

media:content.media:description: WHO openly worried over the "scale and speed" of an outbreak of a rare type of Ebola in eastern Congo.

item.description: The virus spread undetected for weeks after the first known death as authorities tested for a more common type of Ebola and came up negative, health experts and aid workers said.
item.content:encoded: The virus spread undetected for weeks after the first known death as authorities tested for a more common type of Ebola and came up negative, health experts and aid workers said.

item.title: "Racist, Derogatory": Norwegian Paper Slammed For PM Modi-Snake Charmer Cartoon
item.description: A Norwegian newspaper sparked outrage after publishing a cartoon depicting PM Narendra Modi as a snake charmer, triggering accusations of racism and colonial stereotyping.
item.content:encoded: A Norwegian newspaper sparked outrage after publishing a cartoon depicting PM Narendra Modi as a snake charmer, triggering accusations of racism and colonial stereotyping.

item.title: US Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Says He Was Just '60 Minutes' Away From Relaunching Iran Attacks
item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: US Pledges Major Ebola Aid Surge, Slams WHO Over Delayed Alert In Africa Outbreak
item.description: Washington, May 20 (IANS) Pledging a major surge in assistance to contain a fast-moving Ebola outbreak in Central Africa, the Trump Administration sharply criticised the World Health Organization (WHO) for what American officials described as a delay
item.content:encoded: Washington, May 20 (IANS) Pledging a major surge in assistance to contain a fast-moving Ebola outbreak in Central Africa, the Trump Administration sharply criticised the World Health Organization (WHO) for what American officials described as a delay

item.title: PM Modi's 'Sambandh' Outreach At Indo-Nordic Summit In Oslo Explained

media:content.media:description: PM Modi with Nordic leaders at the Indo-Nordic Summit (File).

item.description: PM Modi arrived in Norway from Sweden as part of an extensive tour covering the UAE, Netherlands, Sweden, Norway, and Italy from May 15-20.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi arrived in Norway from Sweden as part of an extensive tour covering the UAE, Netherlands, Sweden, Norway, and Italy from May 15-20.

item.title: Iran Warns US Of "Many More Surprises" After Trump Threatens New Strikes

media:content.media:description: Abbas Araghchi's comments came after US gave Tehran an ultimatum to reach a peace deal

item.description: Araghchi said that Iranian forces are confirmed to be the first to down an American F-35 fighter jet, citing a US congressional report on aircraft combat losses.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1101681/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Araghchi said that Iranian forces are confirmed to be the first to down an American F-35 fighter jet, citing a US congressional report on aircraft combat losses.

item.title: Video: Tesla Cybertruck Water Test Goes Wrong, Vehicle Sinks In Texas Lake

media:content.media:description: The driver had steered the truck into the lake on purpose.

item.description: The Grapevine Fire Department's Water Rescue Team and other authorities later used a wrecker to pull the waterlogged Cybertruck.
item.content:encoded: The Grapevine Fire Department's Water Rescue Team and other authorities later used a wrecker to pull the waterlogged Cybertruck.

item.title: Oil Prices Ease After Trump Says US Will End Iran War 'Very Quickly'

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump said Iran's leaders are begging for a deal.

item.description: Trump's comments on the need to strike again came a day after he said he had paused a planned resumption of hostilities.
item.content:encoded: Trump's comments on the need to strike again came a day after he said he had paused a planned resumption of hostilities.

item.title: 4 Republicans Side With Democrats, Stand Up Against Trump's Iran War
item.description: At present, the Republicans have narrow leads in both chambers; they lead 217-212 in the House and 53-45 in the Senate. Two independent senators usually back the Democrats.
item.content:encoded: At present, the Republicans have narrow leads in both chambers; they lead 217-212 in the House and 53-45 in the Senate. Two independent senators usually back the Democrats.

item.title: Pics: PM Modi's Dinner, Drive, Colosseum Diplomacy With Meloni In Rome

media:content.media:description: The viral 'Melodi' photo has garnered over a million views on X.

item.description: The picture shows the Colosseum, originally known as the Flavian Amphitheatre, a massive stone oval in the center of Rome illuminated in the background.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1101691/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The picture shows the Colosseum, originally known as the Flavian Amphitheatre, a massive stone oval in the center of Rome illuminated in the background.

item.title: Taiwan Travelogue, A Historical Romance, Wins International Booker Prize
item.description: Yang, who writes fiction, essays, manga and video game scripts, has said she "wanted to untangle the complex circumstances" of Taiwan's time as a Japanese colony.
item.content:encoded: Yang, who writes fiction, essays, manga and video game scripts, has said she "wanted to untangle the complex circumstances" of Taiwan's time as a Japanese colony.

item.title: Why Is The Latest Ebola Outbreak So Hard To Contain? Explained

media:content.media:description: A fast-spreading Ebola outbreak in Central Africa is raising global concern.

item.description: Public health agencies say the coming weeks will be crucial in determining whether the outbreak can be contained before it expands further across the region.
item.content:encoded: Public health agencies say the coming weeks will be crucial in determining whether the outbreak can be contained before it expands further across the region.

item.title: "We Were All Set": Trump Says US Was "An Hour Away" From New Strikes On Iran

media:content.media:description: The Republican leader said that Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon because they would use it

item.description: The comment follows Trump's recent statement on Sunday that "the clock is ticking" for Iran to accept a peace deal with the United States and "there won't be anything left of them" if Tehran's leaders don't "get moving, FAST".
item.content:encoded: The comment follows Trump's recent statement on Sunday that "the clock is ticking" for Iran to accept a peace deal with the United States and "there won't be anything left of them" if Tehran's leaders don't "get moving, FAST".
